The '''Shusugaunt''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Shusugaunt]] in the [[Raioballo sector/Legends|Raioballo sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

A race of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]-faring warriors, the Shusugaunt were short in stature, and were considered to be an aggressive people. The Shusugaunt were encountered by a colony [[Starship/Legends|ship]] from [[Gravlex Med/Legends|Gravlex Med]] millennia before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and attempted to [[Conquest of Anx Space|conquer]] and take control of the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. However, the Shusugaunt were unprepared for the planet's low gravity, and found themselves unable to fight without becoming dizzy by the light gravitic forces. The Shusugaunt fled Gravlex Med, leaving the Anx alone.
